content.problemStatement:
The task is to count all the possible paths from top left to bottom right of a m×nm \times nm×n matrix with the constraints that from each cell you can either move only to right or down.

Since the answer will be large, output the answer modulo 109+710^9 + 7109+7


Input Format

First line consists of TTT test cases. First line of every test case consists of NNN and MMM, denoting the number of rows and number of columns respectively.


Output Format
Single line output i.e., count of all the possible paths from top left to bottom right of a m×nm \times nm×n matrix..
